data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All acceptance criteria satisfied: (1) suggestion-record.sh is executable and writes JSON to .tickets-tracker/.suggestions/; (2) flock-based serialization via _flock_stage_commit from ticket-lib.sh; (3) ticket list and health exclude suggestions (hidden dir convention — starts with '.'); (4) suggestion-schema-contract.md created; (5) 8 RED tests written → 5/5 targeted assertions GREEN
